# Solar Contractor Insurance

> Contractors Choice Agency — specialized insurance for solar contractors and solar installers.

## Services

- General Liability Insurance for solar contractors
- Workers Compensation Insurance for solar installers
- Commercial Auto Insurance for solar contractor fleets
- Professional Liability (Errors & Omissions) Insurance
- Surety Bonds (license, permit, bid, performance, payment)
- Equipment Breakdown Coverage / Inland Marine (tools & equipment)
- Umbrella / Excess Liability Insurance

## About

Contractors Choice Agency specializes in comprehensive insurance solutions exclusively for solar contractors. Founded by Josh Cotner, a former contractor with over 20 years of experience, we understand the unique risks solar installers face — from installation errors to property damage and worksite accidents.

We shop the market across dozens of programs and carriers to get solar contractors the best price and coverage. Licensed in all 50 states.

## Contact

- Phone: +1-844-967-5247

- Quote turnaround: 15 minutes
- Claims response: 2 hours

## Coverage Details

Solar contractors face unique risks including installation errors, property damage, worksite accidents, and equipment failure. Our coverage packages address every aspect:

- **General Liability**: Third-party bodily injury, property damage, and advertising injury
- **Professional Liability**: Errors & Omissions for design, installation, and maintenance mistakes
- **Workers Compensation**: State-controlled coverage with expertise in the 22-year tail liability period
- **Commercial Auto**: Business auto policies with recommended $1,000,000 minimum coverage
- **Equipment/Inland Marine**: Tools, equipment, and solar panel inventory
- **Surety Bonds**: Any size bond, any credit profile — license, permit, bid, performance, payment, maintenance bonds
